title: IIM Udaipur Junior Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
organization: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur)
short_info: Indian Institute of Management Udaipur (IIM Udaipur) Junior Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Indian Institute of Management Udaipur. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Udaipur Junior Associate Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university.
qualification.details: Graduate in any discipline from a recognized university. Candidates with prior experience in administration and digital content management will be preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per qualifications, experience, and institutional norms.
salary_details.details: As per qualifications, experience, and institutional norms.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Udaipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Associate position at IIM Udaipur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Junior Associate post at IIM Udaipur is 02 June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Junior Associate role?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification for the Junior Associate position is a Graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized university. Prior experience in administration and digital content management is preferred but not mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Associate position at the Indian Institute of Management Udaipur.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the Junior Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Junior Associate recruitment at IIM Udaipur. Candidates can apply without any financial obligation.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for the Junior Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Associate position at IIM Udaipur involves two main stages: an initial Application Review followed by an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The Junior Associate position at IIM Udaipur is a contract-based job. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the institute.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the IIM Udaipur Junior Associate Recruitment 2026 can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the Junior Associate position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Associate position will be determined based on the candidate's qualifications, relevant experience, and the institutional norms of IIM Udaipur.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Rajasthan apply for this post?
faq.answer: The notification mentions inviting applications from eligible candidates in Rajasthan. It is advisable to check the official notification for any specific domicile requirements or eligibility for candidates from other states.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of IIM Udaipur?
faq.answer: The official website of the Indian Institute of Management Udaipur is www.iimu.ac.in. You can visit this site for more information about the institute and its various activities.
